_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 heterozygosity fosters de novo tumorigenesis but impairs malignant transformation.

_contextSnippet: a large fraction of Nf1 +/− mice (44%, 4 out of 9) developed papilloma, whereas no (0 out of 50) Nf1 f/f...mice showed any sign of papilloma formation at week 19
details: 44% developed papilloma compared to 12% in Nf1+/+ mice, but all tumors remained benign while most Nf1+/+ tumors progressed to malignant SCC
